mapper.sql: practice_id, student_id, student_name, practice_type, request_content, requested_mentor_count, preferred_mentor_names, status, mentor_ids, mentor_names, mentor_backgrounds, scheduled_at, completed_hours, feedback_rating, feedback_summary, submitted_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select:
select
from osg_mock_practice where student_id = #{studentId} order by submitted_at desc, practice_id desc

select
from osg_mock_practice
del_flag = '0'
and FIND_IN_SET(#{currentMentorId}, mentor_ids)
and practice_type = #{practiceType}
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc

select
from osg_mock_practice where practice_id = #{practiceId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into osg_mock_practice ( student_id, student_name, practice_type, request_content, requested_mentor_count, preferred_mentor_names, status, mentor_ids, mentor_names, mentor_backgrounds, scheduled_at, completed_hours, feedback_rating, feedback_summary, submitted_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{practiceType}, #{requestContent}, #{requestedMentorCount}, #{preferredMentorNames}, #{status}, #{mentorIds}, #{mentorNames}, #{mentorBackgrounds}, #{scheduledAt}, #{completedHours}, #{feedbackRating}, #{feedbackSummary}, #{submittedAt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
